title: Department Manager Vacancy at Om Book Shop - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Om Book Shop - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Om Book Shop is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Om Book Shop:
Om Book Shop is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop!
